title: Episode Explorer
text:
Interactive map of movement episodes.


Warning: sf layer is not long-lat data


Warning: sf layer has inconsistent datum (+proj=merc +a=6378137 +b=6378137 +lat_ts=0 +lon_0=0 +x_0=0 +y_0=0 +k=1 +units=m +nadgrids=@null +wktext +no_defs).
Need '+proj=longlat +datum=WGS84'


Warning: sf layer is not long-lat data


Warning: sf layer has inconsistent datum (+proj=merc +a=6378137 +b=6378137 +lat_ts=0 +lon_0=0 +x_0=0 +y_0=0 +k=1 +units=m +nadgrids=@null +wktext +no_defs).
Need '+proj=longlat +datum=WGS84'


Input to asJSON(keep_vec_names=TRUE) is a named vector. In a future version of jsonlite, this option will not be supported, and named vectors will be translated into arrays instead of objects. If you want JSON object output, please use a named list instead. See ?toJSON.
